armpicom.service.isubprocessor module¶

isubprocessor.py

Info

Defines abstract interface for sub-process execution.

class armpicom.service.isubprocessor.ISubProcessor[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract interface for sub-process execution.

It defines:

methods:
run - Executes a sub-process.
is_initialized - Checks if the subprocessor is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the SubProcessor as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if the subprocessor is initialized.

Returns:

True if the subprocessor is initialized, False otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract run(*, params: Mapping[str, Any]) → Mapping[str, Any][source]¶

Runs a sub-process.

Parameters:

params (<Mapping[str, Any]>) – The command parameters to execute.

Returns:

Return code, stdout and stderr messages.

Return type:

<Mapping[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.
